closed_positions.selection: Czechia win + Switzerland win + Under 2.5 + BTTS No (4-fold)
closed_positions.notes: currency=GBP; Betfair Bet Boost applied 5.56->6.02 (boosted return GBP60.19 on GBP10). Legs: Czechia ML win (Cze v RSA), Switzerland ML win + Under 2.5 + BTTS-No (Sui v Bih). Boost promo P1. Break-even prob @6.02 = 16.6%. Provisional model joint ~15.5% (Czech ~54.8% x Swiss-builder ~28.3%) => ~break-even/marginal; EV/model_prob left NULL pending fresh model re-fit on full completed-match results (results.csv stale @2026-06-14). [REFIT 24-match: joint model prob 12.9% (Czech win 51.6% x Swiss 1-0/2-0 25.0%); break-even @6.02=16.6%; EV=-GBP2.24 (-22%). Boost insufficient; -EV but already placed.] [SETTLED LOST 2026-06-20: Czech/SA 1-1 (Czechia win leg failed); Swiss 4-1 (Under2.5 + BTTS-No legs also failed). 3 of 4 legs lost.]

Betfair Exchange Free-£10-when-you-bet-£10 qualifier. HEDGE against the Scotland-long real-money book (Betfred builders id67/68 + Shankland FGS id70). +8% model EV (16.8% @6.40). Real money, normal settle: win +£54, lose -£10. Settles ~03:00 14th (in 8-14 Jun window). Unlocks £10 SNR free bet -> plan: Australia @5.70 (+39%).

closed_positions.match: Haiti vs Scotland — Shankland First Goalscorer (Double Delight)
closed_positions.notes: Standalone FGS single to capture Betfred Double Delight & Hat-Trick Heaven. Base odds 4.5; settles: no first goal -> lose £10; scores 1st only -> £35 profit @4.5; scores 1st + brace -> odds DOUBLE to 9.0 (£80 profit); + hat-trick -> TREBLE to 13.5 (£125). Market-calibrated edge ~+15% (prudent de-vig), driven by the boost. Manual settle for brace/hat-trick upside.
